templateName: Metabolomics (HK2 Assay) – Standard Curve and Sample Preparation
query: Design an automated workflow for the standard-curve preparation and sample-preprocessing steps in a metabolomics experiment. The workflow focuses on microplate layout and sample pretreatment. Key tasks include generating a serial dilution series of NADH standards to construct the calibration curve, and performing multi-level dilutions of high-concentration serum samples to ensure that final analytical results fall within the valid linear range.

templateName: Metabolomics (HK2 Assay) – Reagent Reconstitution and Preparation
query: Design an automated workflow for reconstitution and preparation of reagents in metabolomics experiments. This workflow serves as the pre-processing stage of the experiment. Its primary task is to automatically reconstitute and mix all required lyophilized reagents (e.g., coenzymes, developer enzyme mixtures, NADH standards) to ensure that all core components are in an active state and ready for subsequent use.
